samples.text: All ants are insects. A beetle is an insect. Is a beetle an ant?
Every member of ants is among insects. A beetle is an insect. Does it follow that a beetle is an ant?
All worker ants are arthropods. A beetle is an arthropod. Is a beetle a worker ant?
Being an insect does not by itself make something an ant. A beetle is an insect. Is a beetle an ant?
All ants are insects. A beetle is an insect. There are several books on the shelf. Is a beetle an ant?
